metadata.claim_text: Distal biceps rupture causes weakness and hook test abnormality; early repair preserves supination strength.
Students often underweight exam findings and over-rely on imaging when evaluating distal biceps tendon rupture.
Do not anchor on a single exam maneuver for distal biceps tendon rupture — integrate mechanism, instability symptoms, and imaging pattern.
State mechanism, key exam findings, imaging role, treatment concept, and return-to-play framework for distal biceps tendon rupture.
Rehabilitation milestones and return-to-play criteria for distal biceps tendon rupture require attending-defined progression gates.
Hook test loss and ecchymosis over the antecubital fossa support distal biceps rupture.
